name: soulcraft-scripts
description: One-off maintenance scripts (Notion -> runtime data export). The Notion SDK is pinned to the v2 API these scripts were written against: @notionhq/client v5+ replaced databases.query with the data-source API (dataSources.query), which breaks the export. Install here (cd scripts && npm install) so a plain install always resolves the compatible version, regardless of anything installed at the repo root.
